config.label: Access Token
config.help: Meta WhatsApp Cloud API access token (Bearer). System User token recommended (long-lived).

config.label: Phone Number ID
config.help: Cloud API sender Phone Number ID (Meta App → WhatsApp → API Setup).

config.label: Webhook Secret
config.help: A secret you choose. Set Meta callback URL to: https://<your-public-host>/api/kernel/webhook/whatsapp-channel?secret=<this>. The connector self-provisions it on boot so the host intake accepts Meta's POST.
